title: NATIONAL GEOGRAPHIC Clay Dinosaur Craft Kit – Dinosaur Arts & Crafts for Kids with 5 Colors of Air Dry Clay, 5 Dino Skeletons, Googly Eyes, Sculpting Tool, STEM Activity for Boys & Girls
features: MOULD CLAY OVER 5 DINO SKELETONS - Design colourful dino figurines by shaping the 5 colours of clay over the 5 dino skeletons (T. Rex, Stegosaurus, Triceratops, Dimetrodon, Brachiosaurus). Use the sculpting tool and 30 googly eyes to add more character!

CREATE ONE-OF-A-KIND DESIGNS - With this clay craft kit, kids can let their imagination and creativity flow! The 5 clay colours are easy to mold and shape around the dino skeletons. Kids can mix and match colours to create their own fun designs!

EVERYTHING KIDS NEED - This all-in-one air-dry clay craft kit includes everything kids need to make their own unique dinosaurs: 5 colours of air-dry clay (red, blue, purple, yellow, green), 5 dino skeletons, 30 googly eyes & a sculpting tool.

LEARN FUN DINOSAUR FACTS - The included full-colour Learning Guide is filled with information about the five types of dinosaurs included in the kit, as well as how scientists use fossils to understand what dinosaurs actually looked like!

AWARD-WINNING PRODUCTS - Blue Marble, winner of the Toy Association's prestigious Toy of the Year Award, proudly develops products that foster education, imagination, and creativity, with a U.S. support team to ensure a stellar experience!

Rex, Stegosaurus, Triceratops, Dimetrodon, Brachiosaurus). Use the sculpting tool and 30 googly eyes to add more character! Kids can mix and match colours to create their own fun designs! With this clay craft kit, kids can let their imagination and creativity flow! With the National Geographic Air Dry Clay Dinosaur Craft Kit, kids can create 5 colourful dinosaurs using 5 colours of air-dry clay and googly eyes! A sculpting tool is also included to make molding and shaping easy for kids. This Clay Dinosaur Craft Kit includes: 5 colours of air-dry clay (red, blue, purple, yellow, green) 5 dinosaur skeletons (T. Rex, Stegosaurus, Triceratops, Dimetrodon, Brachiosaurus 30 googly eyes Sculpting tool Instructions and Learning Guide The air-dry clay and included supplies in this kit make it easy for kids to design colourful, fun dinosaur figures they can display proudly! The clay is soft and easy for kids to work with, so they can focus on their creativity as they mix and match colours and add googly eyes to their dinos. A full-color Learning Guide is also included, filled with fun facts about the 5 dinosaurs in the kit, fossils, and more. Order the National Geographic Air Dry Clay Dinosaur Craft Kit today and show your kids just how much fun arts & crafts time can be! We make the highest quality hands-on science toys, and all products are backed by exceptional service. With a mission to inspire people to care about the planet, the National Geographic Society is one of the world’s largest nonprofit scientific and educational organizations.
